# runDriftScan

> Orchestrate drift detection: fetch data, detect, score, alert if needed

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| agentLabel | string | yes |
| baselinePeriod | json | yes |
| currentPeriod | json | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[outputDrift: call detectOutputDrift]
  A --> B[costDrift: call detectCostDrift]
  B --> C[behaviorDrift: call detectBehaviorDrift]
  C --> D[overallScore: call calculateDriftScore]
  D --> E[severity: condition]
  E --> F[detection: call]
  F --> G[alert: condition]
  G --> H[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `DriftDetection`
